name: Precipitate Gold Corp.
summary: Precipitate Gold Corp. engages in the exploration, exploitation, and development of mineral resources in Canada and the Dominican Republic. The company primarily explores for gold and base metal deposits. Its properties in the Dominican Republic include the Pueblo Grande, Juan de Herrera, and Ponton properties that cover an area of approximately 25,922 hectares. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
